slice_description: E2 Parse Reliability Fix — tolerant parser + hardened prompt

arguments.song: {JSON string of Clair de Lune mm. 1-4 song entry}

questions.questionText: How many notes with pitch class C# appear in this phrase?

In measure 3, which pitch does the right hand play on beat 3.25?
